phone.title: Phone Login

captcha.title: Complete Security Verification
captcha.description:
Sending SMS requires security verification.

Open the CAPTCHA page in your browser, complete the verification, then paste the displayed ticket and randstr below.

sms_code.title: Enter Verification Code
sms_code.description: Enter the 6-digit SMS verification code sent to your phone.

legacy.title: Paste Session JSON
legacy.description:
Paste the session JSON captured from the Al-Link app.

The JSON should contain: auth_token (or token), user_id (or userId), family_id (or familyId), family_uk (or familyUk).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Smith API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired verification code. Please request a new one.
error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON format. Please paste the session data captured from the Al-Link app.
error.captcha_failed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
